data.content: Plan review: approved. The release hardening plan is complete and feasible, and the validation strategy covers the release race that caused the failure. Addendum from user request: keep the Claude-facing copy of the ship-release skill synchronized by copying the hardened .agents/skills/ship-release/SKILL.md into .claude/skills/ship-release/SKILL.md and committing/pushing that follow-up as part of implementation.
